creator: yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
After I send-pr'ed, new version of shinonome has been released.
So I wanna fix my last PR as follows.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/shinonome/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.14
diff -u -r1.14 Makefile
--- Makefile	2001/06/15 13:28:31	1.14
+++ Makefile	2001/06/22 15:30:39
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	shinonome
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.3
 CATEGORIES=	japanese x11-fonts
 MASTER_SITES= 	http://openlab.ring.gr.jp/efont/dist/shinonome/
 
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/shinonome/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.1.1.1
diff -u -r1.1.1.1 distinfo
--- distinfo	2001/06/15 06:18:27	1.1.1.1
+++ distinfo	2001/06/22 15:33:54
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (shinonome-0.9.2.tar.bz2) = 7b42d052eebfb4c03c7b9354ee3a91e6
+MD5 (shinonome-0.9.3.tar.bz2) = 9005d932807ec485124a9320a926577d
